content:
On behalf of the team and everyone who contributed, I am pleased to announce the availability of Spring Data 2025.0.13.

This service release is expected to be the final open-source release of the Spring Data 3.5.x generation and contains regression fixes only.
Please consider upgrading to the latest 4.0.x (2025.1.x release train) or 4.1.x release at your earliest convenience.

Spring Boot 3.5.16 is scheduled to pick up this Spring Data release tomorrow.

2025.0.13

• Spring Data Commons 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data JPA 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data MongoDB 4.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data for Apache Cassandra 4.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data KeyValue 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data Neo4j 7.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data LDAP 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data REST 4.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data Redis 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data Elasticsearch 5.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data Couchbase 5.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog

• Spring Data Relational 3.5.13 - Javadoc - Documentation - Changelog
